{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322062456BD85680B7F71E6D71653"}"},"total":1669},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7177649865902654220","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大的思路很贴切实际，非常丝滑，剧情很符合逻辑，不像其他水文那样胡诌八扯的。应和海贼内容，值得推荐，希望一定一定要保持住风格。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671176971,"group_id":"7163297068709055495","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"夜空中最亮的星，能否听清，那仰望的人，心底的孤独和叹息。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2HJo48RUT8fzmXvdupOAT2/24w345CAH3RptoJTkS+t","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35baaeb199384f0d928b05cd52d22076~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703284&x-signature=3IJPrDpwiJI%2BSsuKgmw2IbiC4Lc%3D","user_id":"1407846924950094","user_name":"爱吃紫菜的酱肉包"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1407846924950094","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708293043,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7163297068709055495","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统＋幻兽种·吸血鬼果实＋大剑豪＋三色霸气＋N女主＋日常＋lsp】
作为一名穿越者，卡尔·D·萨菲罗斯在错误的时间、错误的地点，获得了吸血鬼果实……
        他只想在这个混乱无序的海贼王世界，过上惬意而又精彩的人生。
立场？
正义与邪恶？
胜者为王，败者为寇！
正义与邪恶，那是胜利者才有资格定夺的东西……
当然，作为一个枭雄，他并不介意自己成为胜利者！
海贼女帝波雅汉库克：“萨菲罗斯，只要是你想，妾身可以为你做任何事！”
光月日和：“为了主人的大业，桃之助哥哥，请你去死吧！”
海军元帅战国：“我一直搞不明白，萨菲罗斯这个家伙究竟是不是正义……”
革命军首领多拉格：“同志，你能不能帮我修订一下革命纲领……”
世界政府全军总帅钢骨空：“萨菲罗斯这个家伙……真是让人头疼！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c3f2785d037f9345b20afccdf734a406","author":"忆梦彼方","author_id":"","book_id":"7163297068709055495","book_name":"海贼：我只是想让她们幸福啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0a098","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7168414074277986829","read_count":"19308","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1380578"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"507","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,海贼,女帝,开局,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e1a29270b335a77ac4f90241bfc0936d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315896&x-signature=I0vRSrEwNY1hW2crDmGr5ovmAuI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2616460868069540","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.181599e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322062456BD85680B7F71E6D71653"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5181,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":44051},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1671390836,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476644430280835902","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书对于女帝的关系是我最喜欢的一本，一些经典中的同人关系处理，很多时候遇见的晚了就是会很难处理，怎么看都怪异，这本书就很好，在女帝遇难前就进入她的心里。
我第一次看的时候还没完结，这又看了很多海贼同人又找到这本想再看一遍。
看后宫爽文看的多了发现思想都改变了，以前看书很自然的作为旁观者在看，现在看都是自然而然的将自己代入主角，一些自绿，虐主，冤枉恶心主角一看就来气想骂作者，这本书没有，兄弟们可以放心看。和我有相同感受的兄弟们，不用等第二章最后的作者大大的提醒，提醒的太含蓄了，听劝一点，先看320和321再开始看，不是魂穿的后宫文，兄弟们可以放心看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740796367,"group_id":"7163297068709055495","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N08g/Qy5fwJwwKKpc+RuXUM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"264348267191111","user_name":"爱吃卤水的玉鼎藤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"264348267191111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7163297068709055495","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统＋幻兽种·吸血鬼果实＋大剑豪＋三色霸气＋N女主＋日常＋lsp】
